name: clojure
description: Use the Clojure tools to run Clojure programs on the JVM, start a REPL, or invoke a specific function with data

options.name: -A
options.description: Use concatenated aliases to modify classpath

args.name: a/fn
args.description: An alias to refer to its function or a qualified function

args.name: kvs
args.description: A list of key-value arguments to merge with the exec-args

args.name: kv-map
args.description: Map to merge with the :exec-args map, taking precedence over kvs

options.name: -T
options.description: Invoke tool by name or via aliases ala -X

args.name: a/fn
args.description: An alias to refer to its function or a qualified function

args.name: kvs
args.description: A list of key-value arguments to merge with the exec-args

args.name: kv-map
args.description: Map to merge with the :exec-args map, taking precedence over kvs

options.name: -M
options.description: Use concatenated aliases to modify classpath or supply main opts

options.name: -P
options.description: Prepare deps - download libs, cache classpath, but don't exec

options.name: -J
options.description: Pass opt through in java_opts

options.name: -Sdeps
options.description: Pass the deps data on the command line

options.name: -Spath
options.description: Compute classpath and echo to stdout only

options.name: -Scp
options.description: Use specified classpath instead of cached or computed one

options.name: -Sdescribe
options.description: Print environment and command parsing information as data

options.name: -Sforce
options.description: Ignore classpath cache and force recomputation

options.name: -Spom
options.description: Generate (or update) pom.xml with deps and paths

options.name: -Srepro
options.description: Ignore the ~/.clojure/deps.edn config file

options.name: -Sthreads
options.description: Set the number of threads to use when downloading dependencies

options.name: -Strace
options.description: Write a trace.edn file that traces deps expansion

options.name: -Stree
options.description: Print dependency tree

options.name: -Sverbose
options.description: Print all path locations

name: -version
--version
options.description: Print the Clojure CLI version

name: -i
--init
options.description: Load a file or resource

name: -e
--eval
options.description: Evaluate expressions in string; print non-nil values

options.name: --report
options.description: Report uncaught exceptions

name: -m
--main
options.description: Call the -main function from a namespace with args

args.name: args
args.description: The arguments to pass to the -main function

name: -r
--repl
options.description: Run a REPL

name: -h
--help
options.description: Show help for clojure
